titleStmt.title: SII 9.429: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 429. (A.R. No. 320 of 1922.) ON A SLAB ON MALLAYYA-KONDA NEAR TAMBALLAPALLE, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1327, Pārthiva, Āshāḍha, śu. 1, corresponding to A.D. 1405 May 29 Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Devarāya-Mahārāya. It records the nirūpa issued by the king to Mayilappa, stating that the mānya village Tammaḍiyahaḷḷi, together with 25 varāhas, being the kāṇike received on Śivarātri and other occasions in the temple of Mallikārjuna at Chandragiri in Mārjavāḍi-nāḍu, be restored and continued as in the time of Kaṁpaṇṇa-Voḍeya, Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya and Chikkoḍeya and that the same be given effect to commencing from Tāraṇa, Kārtika, śu. 1 (= A.D. 1404 October 5). It also states that the sum of the kāṇike be distributed among the sthānapatis of the temple whose names and the shares they were to get are written in Telugu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . jayābhyudayaśakava
rusaṁbulu 1327 Avunēṭi pārttivasa
ṁvatsara Aṣāḍha śu 1 lū śrīmanumahā
maṁḍalēśvara harirāyavibhāḷa bhāśake ta
ppuva rāyaragaṁḍa pūrvvapaścimadakṣi
ṇōttaracatusamudrādhipati rājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīradēvarāyama
hārāyaḍu mayilappage nirūpa . mā
rjavāḍayanāḍa voḷage yiha caṁdragi
riya mallikārjunadēvarige Anādipū
rvadali caṁdu bahadaṁtā taṁmaḍiya
haḷi(ya)yaṁba puravanū sivarāśri mo
dalāgi bahadaṁtā kāṇikevanū
Ā dēvarige Amrutapaḍige sarvvamānya
vāgi caṁdu baralāgi yīga pūrvvamariyā
de Aṇagi Ānāḍi Adhikāragaḷanū sivarātri
kāṇike Aramanege bahudeṁdu Ā dēvara pū
jārigaḷu Āru bāgiya pūjārigaḷanū ka
rasi varuṣake varahāṇa yipattaAyidu ho
ṁnanū koḷutta baharu kaṁḍāpūrvadalu
kaṁpaṁṇavoḍeyaru bukaṁṇayoḍa
yaru cikoḍeyara kāla toḍagiU Ā dēva
ra kāṇike Ā dēvarige caṁdubahudeṁdu
Āru bāgiya stānikaruṁ taṁma kayya sā
dhānagaḷanū tōṟi biṁnahava māḍidakke
nāu Ā mariyāde Elā naḍasi bahudeṁ
du nirūpau koṭavāgi mundake tāraṇasaṁ
vatsara kārtika su 1 Ārubhyavāgi Ā sivarātri
kāṇike Ā yippattaAyidu varahaṇa hoṁna
bēḍidāṁge Aramanege citta du Adhikāri
gaḷige hēḷikaḷihi Āgñeyavanu māḍuUdu Ā malli
kārjunadēvara puravanū kāṇikeyāvanū
pūrvvamariyāde tappade Āṁge kaṁppaṁṇa
Ūḍeyarū bukkaṁṇaūḍeyarū cikkoḍeya
ra kāla modalāgiU hiṁde naḍedu baṁda mari
yāde yelā Aṣṭabhōgatējyasvā(ṁ)mye sa
hita Ācaṁdrārkastāhihāgi Adhikārisu
ṁkiga taḷavāraru Āru Ūgadāṁge kaṭaḷeya
nu māḍi sarvvamānyavāgi naḍasi bahadu �yo
rāyasada maryyādeya Ā caṁdragiriya ma
likārjunadēvarige pūrvvadalu saluvaṁtā vo
rigeU kāṇikegau Aṣṭabhōga tējyasvā(ṁ)
myaṁ sahityavāgi kallugaḷa sāsānavanū māḍi
sikoṁbudu �yo caṁdragiri malikārjunadē
vara stānāpatulu pedamalajīyyala bayira
jīyyala koḍaku bhānajīyyala vīriki celle
Ārokapāluṁnu malajīyalaku Okapā
luṁnu bhānajīyalaku mūḍuvāḍa lekana
Anubhaviṁturu nāgajīyala bayyana tana
malayyala koḍukulu koṁḍajīyyalavāḍu
cilajīyalukuṁ ciṁnajīyya
lavīriki celle Ārokkapāluṁnu koṁḍajī
yyalu Atani taṁmulu naluguru ta(ṁ)mma
sakamu(ṁ)nnu cillajīyyāla Ātani cāriki
sakamuṁnu saṁdāya
jīyyala bhānajīya
jīyyala bayaraḍi
vīru tamaku cele Ārokapāluṁ
jīyalaku Okapālanu malajīyya
tama pāḍalekananu
Digital edition of SII 9.429 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
